⌂ Residential ● Available Phase II

Crown Town
Phase – II

By Lucknow Fields Empire Builders & Developers & Hitashie Construction & Developer

Basic Sale Price ₹3,999/Sq. Ft.
Plan Type P + C
Location Lucknow, UP
Enquire Now View Payment Plan
About the Project

A New Chapter in Lucknow Living

Crown Town Phase – II is a thoughtfully planned residential and plotted development by Lucknow Fields Empire Builders & Developers in association with Hitashie Construction & Developer — two trusted names in Lucknow’s real estate landscape.

Designed for families who value space, security, and long-term appreciation, Crown Town Phase – II offers an integrated community living experience with well-laid roads, landscaped parks, and essential infrastructure already in place.

With a competitive Basic Sale Price of ₹3,999 per Sq. Ft. and a flexible Purchase + Construction plan, this project is structured for both end-users and discerning investors looking for solid returns in Lucknow’s growing residential corridor.

Project Type

Residential Plots + Construction

Location

Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh

Payment Plan

Purchase + Construction (P+C)

Basic Sale Price

₹3,999 per Sq. Ft.

Possession

As per Construction Milestones

Developer

Lucknow Fields Empire & Hitashie

Why Choose This Project

Key Highlights

Prime Location

Strategically located in Lucknow with excellent connectivity to major roads, schools, hospitals, and commercial hubs.

Gated Community

Secure, fully gated township with 24/7 surveillance and controlled access for residents and guests.

Park-Facing Options

Lush landscaped parks within the community — choose park-facing units for a serene, green outlook every day.

Flexible P+C Plan

A staged Purchase + Construction payment plan so you pay as the project progresses — easy on the pocket.

Plot Registry

Plot registry within 45 days of booking, giving you legal ownership security from day one.

Ready Infrastructure

Wide internal roads, drainage, electrification, and civic amenities developed before possession.

Club Membership

Exclusive club membership included — lifestyle amenities, community spaces, and recreational facilities.

Strong ROI Potential

Competitively priced at ₹3,999/Sq. Ft. in a high-growth corridor — excellent capital appreciation potential.

How You Pay

Purchase + Construction Plan (P+C)

Pay in stages as construction progresses — structured to keep your investment aligned with milestones on the ground.

1

At the time of Booking

10% of BSP

2

Plot Registry within 45 days of Booking

3,000 Sq. ft.

Legal ownership secured early

3

At Starting of Plinth Beam

25% of BSP

4

On Casting of Ground Floor Slab

25% of BSP

5

On Casting of First Floor Slab

25% of BSP

6

On Start of Plaster

15% of BSP

7

At the time of Possession

10% of BSP

+ 100% of other charges
+ 100% of extra work charges (if any)

* Construction / Development stages may be called for payment in any sequence depending on work undertaken by the developer, irrespective of the sequence listed above.

Pricing Details

Pricing & Location Charges

Basic Sale Price (BSP)

₹3,999

per Sq. Ft.

Book Now

Preferential Location Charges (PLC)

Park Facing 10% of BSP
Corner Units 10% of BSP
Park Facing + Corner Units 15% of BSP
Club Membership Fees (One-time) ₹1,00,000
External Development Charges — EDC (One-time) ₹50,000
External Electrification Charges — EEC (One-time) ₹50,000

GST, stamp duty, registration charges & all government levies payable extra by the purchaser.

Important Notes

  1. Price list is for reference only and may be revised at the sole discretion of the Promoter/Developer without prior notice.
  2. The price of the unit will remain firm once booked.
  3. All payments shall be made via Cheque/DD in favour of “Hitashie Construction and Developer / Lucknowfields Empire Pvt. Ltd.” — Collection Account for Crown Town Phase–II, payable at par at Lucknow.
  4. Drawings are conceptual. Area and dimension may vary within permissible limits and will be adjusted before execution of the sale deed.
  5. Any additional area/construction/facilities provided in addition to those mentioned will be chargeable extra.
